allow: Bash(node -e "const PDFDocument = require\('./apps/api/node_modules/pdfkit'\); const doc = new PDFDocument\(\); const chunks = []; doc.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); doc.on\('end', \(\) => { const buf = Buffer.concat\(chunks\); console.log\('PDF size:', buf.length, 'First bytes:', buf.slice\(0,4\).toString\(\)\); }\); doc.text\('Test'\); doc.end\(\);")
